title: Unique Light Algerian Garlic Pasta
description: A fresh and light Algerian dish featuring garlic and a pasta water emulsion, perfect for a low calorie meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the spaghetti.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the lemon juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the reserved pasta water to the skillet and stir to create a light emulsion.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet and toss to coat with the garlic and lemon sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve immediately.
